notes: Rebaselined after Wave-4 thermal fixes plus an ERS 2026 charge/discharge rebalance addressing 'battery empties mid-lap with no way to recover'. Tunes: (a) OPTIMAL_HARVEST_SPEED 80→65 m/s lets typical 200–250 km/h braking zones draw full MGU-K back-torque (previously needed 288 km/h to hit peak harvest); (b) LAP_DEPLOY_TARGET_MJ 4.0→5.0 delays the budget taper so a high-deploy opening sector doesn't leave the car stranded at mid-lap; (c) Conservative SemiAuto band 0.60/0.85 → 0.45/0.75 stops the controller from gutting deploy power to chase a too-high state of charge. Calibration drift: 100 km/h stop 15.89→15.05 m (≈6.4g, real F1 5-6g; closer to real than before); 50 m/s stop 40.04→40.26 m (~6.2g, unchanged in g-terms); 0-100 km/h 3.09→2.88 s (closer to 2026 F1 ≈2.6-2.8 s); DRS 200-300 7.67→7.58 s. All drifts are physically correct and move toward published F1 figures. Earlier Wave-4 history: brakes::heat_to_tires now divides by 130 °C span; Stefan-Boltzmann radiation uses 2× disc area; tire/engine cooling floor at ambient; brake-to-tire heat biased 70/30 inner/outer.
